title: 帝王賞の後に・四神相応

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a great race, Copano Rickey returns to the
runners' tunnel while regaining her breath.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Yeah, I think I got a passing grade. ☆ My running has jumped up a level!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(But if I continue like this, I'll only hit a wall. If I
want to get past it, I'll have to think laterally.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(That means I need to elevate my qi flow to the
same level. The feng shui approach to this would
be...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Getting the Four Guardians in their rightful
positions! By arranging formidable racers who
represent the Four in the right compass
directions, we'll resonate and grow together!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That means me, Tarumae, Acute, and—even
though she doesn't race as much now she's made
a name for herself—Falco!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Since Tarumae's missing from her part of the
formation, there's no way I'll be able to improve.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she saw the race today. If she did, I
hope it inspired her to come back.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But maybe she didn't even see it at all...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In that case, if I want the sparks from my fire to
reach her... I...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Great running out there, Rickey. I wonder what
Tarumae made of it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Acute. Yeah, I'm wondering the same thing. I
have no idea.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you were right, though. Maybe all we can
do is believe in her for now.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Well, maybe that's true for me...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
But you have that "feng shui" thing of yours,
right?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Don't you have some kind of mysterious power
that can help her out?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Acute...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You're right. I do have feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The power to make people smile! And right now,
Tarumae is really suffering!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui isn't some all-powerful magic—it can't
make the world bend to its whims.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But what it can do is bring everything around you into harmony!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, have you got a minute? It's about our
next race!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is telling me that there's a race I
absolutely have to enter. Can you trust me on
this?
choice_data_list:
Sure, but what do you mean when you say feng
shui is "telling" you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The qi vein between Tarumae and her hometown
of Tomakomai has been cut off.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If we can't reconnect it, it'll leave everyone
unhappy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'll repair the connection! It's
something only I can do, with feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Copano Rickey returns to the spectator
stands with a look of determination on her face.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Listen up, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to enter the Mile Championship Nambu
Hai next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ooooh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship Nambu Hai is a G1 race
in October.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Held at Morioka Racecourse in Iwate, it's the first
G1 dirt race of the fall-winter season. In other
words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you live nearby, come and watch! ☆ In fact, all
of you from the Tohoku region should come, if
you can make it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That goes for all of you from Hokkaido, too! I'll
show you the best race you'll see all year—that's a
promise!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And I know the other racers there will feel the
same! I swear it on the Four Guardians!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her statement is both a message, and an
unspoken challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All for one purpose: to reconnect Hokko Tarumae
with her fans in Tomakomai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Tarumae... She might not believe in feng shui.
But still...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to make sure it reaches her! If I just
believe, I know it will!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I won't let her just fade away. I won't accept it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
At the Mile Championship Nambu Hai, I'll make
sure she rises again!
